title: STAR WARS™ - X-Wing Alliance™

notes: The game works out of the box on Proton, but in the menu are graphical artifacts with WineD3D. I copied dgVoodoo2 files and set ddraw to native with protontricks GAMEID winecfg, then the game worked much better with this DX7 to DX10 to Vulkan translation based on dgVoodoo2 and DXVK, even the menu worked fine now and the game looked much better.
title: STAR WARS™ - X-Wing Alliance™
